request.description: Get CRC Port usage hour by hour for a specified time period.

(Required) End date.

(Required) End date.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 30 records.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.

request.description: Get live and past meeting details

urlencoded.description: (Required) The meeting ID Example: ucc69C82Q5mTNyCRWE29Aw== Or B9C73AF4-2F36-4399-9337-2091584DBD03
(Required) Meeting type. 1 means live meeting. 2 means past meeting.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 100 records.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.
(Required) Start date. Only for past meetings.
(Required) End date. Only for past meetings.
(Required) Meeting list type. 1 means live meetings. 2 means past meetings.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 100 meetings.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.

request.description: Get Live Meetings and past meetings for a specified period

urlencoded.description: (Required) Start date. Only for past meetings.
(Required) End date. Only for past meetings.
(Required) Meeting list type. 1 means live meetings. 2 means past meetings.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 100 meetings.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.
(Required) The meeting ID.
(Required) Meeting type. 1 means live meeting. 2 means past meeting.
The user ID to get user qos.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 10. Max of 10 records.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.

request.description: Get a Zoom Room on Zoom via Zoom ID, return the Zoom Room info.

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: (Required) Start date.
(Required) The zoom room ID. Example: ucc69C82Q5mTNyCRWE29Aw== Or B9C73AF4-2F36-4399-9337-2091584DBD03
(Required) End date.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 30 records.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.
